## Memory Review Checklist

- [ ] Candidate contains reusable engineering experience, not a raw chat archive.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, credentials, `.env` values, customer data, or private content.
- [ ] No raw transcript content.
- [ ] Candidate is in `inbox/`, or reviewed memory moved via `scripts/promote_memory.py` / `scripts/reject_memory.py`.
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_memory.py --all` passed.
- [ ] This PR does not auto-merge memories and is not pushed directly to `main`.
